name: CONST_f
description: Fortran-type constant source block - older constant block implementation
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="CONST_f" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="cstblk" simulationFunctionType="TYPE_1" style="CONST_f">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" realPart="1.0"/>
  </ScilabDouble>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Different simulationFunctionName from CONST (cstblk vs cstblk4)
Legacy block - prefers CONST for new designs
criticalRules: TYPE_1 simulation function is legacy Scicos type
Functionally equivalent to CONST but with older implementation
Minimal source block with no inputs
commonUses: Backward compatibility with old Scicos models
